summary: ULN Notification System fully tested - Backend 100% (22/22 tests passed), Frontend 100% (all UI elements working). All CRUD operations, preferences, filtering, and UI interactions verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend service properly excludes MongoDB _id from responses
All notification types and severities handled correctly
Invalid notification types default to 'system' as expected
Preferences upsert works correctly for new users
Frontend properly uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Notification cards have proper severity color indicators and type labels
seed_data_creation: Created 18+ test notifications via pytest for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: ULN Notification System fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: GET/POST /api/uln/notifications, GET /api/uln/notifications/unread-count, PUT /api/uln/notifications/{id}/read, PUT /api/uln/notifications/read-all, DELETE /api/uln/notifications/{id}, DELETE /api/uln/notifications/clear, GET/PUT /api/uln/notifications/preferences. Frontend: ULNNotifications.js component with filters panel, preferences panel, notification cards with severity indicators. Test credentials: owner@bigmannentertainment.com / Test1234!. Known Label ID: BM-LBL-9D0377FB.
